payload.answer: Memory card created with normalized entities and preserved uncertainty markers. Recommend user confirmation of full names and organizational context.
payload.decision: Create memory cards with preserved ambiguity due to shorthand notation

entity_resolution.reason: Shorthand 'goldmn' and 'evns' require confirmation; 'Goldman' could be Goldman Sachs or other entities; 'Bill Evans' could refer to multiple individuals (musician, athlete, etc.)

payload.intent: Extract and normalize person interaction from informal/abbreviated input

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans

details: Parsed 3 entities: Sam, Goldman, Bill Evans
Memory card stored without overwriting potential prior context

repair_options: Confirm full name of Goldman entity (Goldman Sachs, Goldman family, etc.)
Confirm identity of Bill Evans (musician, professional, etc.)
Clarify nature of 'likes' relationship (professional respect, personal preference, romantic interest, etc.)
